name: cover
prompt: Soft, tender hand-painted gouache-style illustration, warm calm reassuring mood, limited palette of warm cream, terracotta, soft blush pink, sage green, muted gold ochre, gentle rounded organic shapes, soft edges, painterly, generous negative space, tasteful and non-clinical. NO text, no letters, no numbers. Scene: a calm newborn baby resting skin to skin on a parent's bare chest just after birth, wrapped loosely in a soft blanket, the parent's hand gently cradling the baby, serene and peaceful, soft warm light, intimate and safe, not clinical.
